title: GLM 5.2 is my new favorite model...
summary: GLM-5.2 is an open-weights AI model licensed under MIT that ranks first on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index. It outperforms GPT-4.5 on the GDPval benchmark and achieved top placement on Design Arena's web design leaderboard, becoming the first model to surpass the Claude line including Claude 3.5.
writeup: This Better Stack video covers GLM-5.2, an open-weights model released under the MIT license that ranks first on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index. The model outperforms GPT-4.5 on the GDPval benchmark and takes the top spot on Design Arena's web design leaderboard, making it the first to surpass the Claude line including Claude 3.5. The combination of a permissive MIT license with leading benchmark and web design results is the central point.
